judgments.explanation: 不是语义冲突。对方 intent 要求 PR body 由 Mainline pr-description 生成并保持 skill 为 PR 发布 workflow 的 source of truth；本次只把开工和 seal 前 freshness gate 收敛到只读 preflight，没有替换 pr-description 或 GitHub publish 流程。

evidence.mainline_aspect: Mainline skill owns PR description workflow; PR body comes from sealed intent data.
evidence.candidate_aspect: Skill 更新新增 preflight-first readiness gate; seal summary acknowledged PR description constraints as preserved.
evidence.why_incompatible: not incompatible: preflight readiness does not generate, overwrite, or bypass PR description content

judgments.explanation: 不是语义冲突。对方 intent 要求 PR description 提示保持条件式，不把 push/PR/merge 变成 Mainline 默认流程；本次 preflight 是 advisory/read-only readiness check，skill 文案没有把 git push、开 PR 或 merge 写成 seal 后必做步骤。

evidence.mainline_aspect: Mainline must not prescribe repository push, PR, hosting, or merge workflow.
evidence.candidate_aspect: preflight reports risk via JSON level/ok_to_continue and recommended_next; it does not execute push/PR/merge or mandate them.
evidence.why_incompatible: not incompatible: both preserve workflow neutrality

judgments.explanation: 不是语义冲突。对方 intent 要求 commit 指引保持用户 Git 流程中立；本次新增的是 readiness check 和条件式 recommended_next，不规定 staging、commit、push、PR、merge 或历史改写为标准路径。

evidence.mainline_aspect: Agent guidance should stay intent/seal/body oriented and not prescribe repository-specific Git mechanics.
evidence.candidate_aspect: preflight remains read-only and does not auto start/append/abandon/seal/rebase/merge; skill fallback stays conditional.
evidence.why_incompatible: not incompatible: readiness guidance is orthogonal to Git workflow mechanics

judgments.explanation: 不是语义冲突。对方 intent 关注开 PR 前校验 pr-description hidden marker，并禁止 connector/gh fallback 覆盖生成内容；本次 skill 只新增 preflight-first 协作 gate，没有移除或替代 PR description marker 校验边界。

evidence.mainline_aspect: mainline:pr-description hidden marker is the stable signal before PR creation/update.
evidence.candidate_aspect: preflight-first guidance is before code work and before commit/seal; it does not define PR body generation or PR update behavior.
evidence.why_incompatible: not incompatible: PR marker preservation remains applicable and unmodified

judgments.explanation: 不是语义冲突。对方 intent 建立 skill-first、hook/AGENTS 轻量边界；本次更新的是 Mainline skill 与 CLI/engine preflight，没有让 hook 承担语义决策，也没有改 init/rewire/AGENTS 默认写入策略。

evidence.mainline_aspect: Mainline agent guidance source of truth is the skill; hooks are context injection, not workflow manual or semantic decision-maker.
evidence.candidate_aspect: preflight is a skill-driven CLI readiness gate and explicitly rejected becoming an automatic workflow driver.
evidence.why_incompatible: not incompatible: both reinforce skill-first guidance and hook non-semantic boundaries
